description: Fishy species dataset JSON schema. Each record in the array represents one fish species. All facts must come from verified sources. Do not invent values. Unknown fields must be null, not empty string or placeholder text.

field_rules.scientific_name: Must be unique across the dataset. Must not be empty.
field_rules.water_type: Must be one of: freshwater, brackish, marine, unknown.
field_rules.temperament: Must be one of: peaceful, semi_aggressive, aggressive, unknown.
field_rules.diet: Must be one of: carnivore, herbivore, omnivore, unknown.
field_rules.care_level: Must be one of: beginner, intermediate, advanced, unknown.
field_rules.verification_status: Must be one of: verified, partially_verified, draft, needs_review.
field_rules.confidence_level: Must be one of: high, medium, low, unknown.
field_rules.image_url: If present, image_source_url and image_license are both required.
field_rules.image_license: Required if image_url is set. Example: CC BY 4.0, CC0, Public Domain.
field_rules.image_source_url: Required if image_url is set. Must be a real URL.
field_rules.unknown_fields: Use null. Never use empty string, N/A, unknown placeholder text, or invented values.
field_rules.verification_verified: For verified status, sources array must have at least one entry with a source_url.
field_rules.verification_partially_verified: For partially_verified status, sources array should have at least one entry.

sources_array.description: Array of source objects. At least one required for verified or partially_verified records.

example_record.description: One of the most popular aquarium fish worldwide.
example_record.care_notes: Male Bettas must be kept individually.
example_record.compatibility_notes: Can coexist with fast-moving peaceful bottom dwellers.
